content.en:
"Kill!"

Jingchi Zhenjun attacked the Zhenjun who surrounded him with all his strength, and used his extreme speed to break through and leave in one direction.

However, these True Monarchs basically had half-dao weapons that limited their speed or special top-notch Chaos Spirit Treasures, and it was difficult for one or two True Monarchs to restrain him, but so many True Monarchs made a move in unison, reducing his speed by many times.

Rumble!!!!

Jing Chi Zhenjun urged the immeasurable true body of the Void Heaven One Vein, and his body turned into a majestic giant, and the terrifying majesty permeated the surroundings.

A true monarch was targeted by Jingchi Zhenjun and was beaten into nothingness by Jingchi Zhenjun with a punch.

However, the attacks of the other True Monarchs fell on Jing Chi True Monarch's body, tearing apart his immeasurable true body.

The Infinite True Body is actually not weak, second only to the Void Heaven Dao Body, it is a very powerful cultivation physique of the Void Heaven One Vein, but there are too many True Monarchs besieging Jingchi True Monarch.

Not to mention that he had only cultivated the Immeasurable True Monarch, even if he cultivated the Void Heaven Dao Body, it would be difficult to compete with so many True Monarchs.

The body was torn, and the blood of the True Monarch was spilled on the earth.

Jingchi Zhenjun fled while fighting, and his appearance was very miserable.

And the other true monarchs were not happy, they fell and died one by one, but seeing that Jingchi Zhenjun's injuries were getting worse and worse, no one refused to give up.

Jing Chi Zhenjun had not cultivated a life-saving chaos magic power similar to the Blood River Immortal Technique, so the speed of recovering from his injuries was very slow, and he could not fight for a long time, and as his injuries became more and more serious, his combat effectiveness became lower and lower.

Suddenly.

Jingchi Zhenjun's body fell from the sky, directly crashing a high mountain to pieces.

And Jingchi Zhenjun was also lying on the ground, his body was almost shattered, and his breath was extremely weak.

And the hundreds of true monarchs who besieged and killed Jingchi Zhenjun are now only more than forty, and in the short battle just now, more than fifty true monarchs fell into the hands of Jingchi Zhenjun, which shows the strength of Jingchi Zhenjun.

"Hahaha, Jingchi Zhenjun has no power to fight back!"

A group of True Monarchs were extremely excited, and they came one after another, completely blocking this place, and surrounding Jingchi True Monarch, but they were also wary and jealous of each other, for fear that the allies just now would make a move on them.

After all, once Jingchi Zhenjun died, the entire net worth of the top true ancestor would become the target of their robbery, although it was said before that all the treasures would be divided equally, but this was just to coax the young children.

In the face of so many treasures, who wants to let go?

As long as a few people are unwilling to let go, then fight and fight.

With so many people, how can it be guaranteed that everyone has the idea of an equal division?

"Looks like I won't be able to survive this time!"

Jingchi Zhenjun said in despair.

Even if he handed over all the treasures at this time, this group of people would not let him go, after all, he had a feud with these true monarchs, and their strength was not as good as his own, how could he let him go!

Just when Keichi was about to meet death, an accident came.

Rumble!!!!

A figure appeared in front of many True Monarchs, accompanied by a cold voice.

"This man is mine!"

The person who opened his mouth was a true monarch - a true monarch without a trace!

When the Traceless True Monarch first entered the Quasi-Dao Realm, he had not yet become the True Monarch of the True Monarch List, but over the years, his strength had improved rapidly, and now he had become the True Monarch of the True Monarch List.

However, he only barely stepped into the ranks of the True Monarch List, and he was in the last place, and he was the weakest True Monarch in the True Monarch List.

But no matter how weak it is in the True Monarch List, it is also the True Monarch of the True Monarch List, and the strength is far beyond the ordinary True Monarch, even if it is the Jingchi True Monarch in its heyday, it is far from being the opponent of the Traceless True Monarch, and the two sides are not strong at the same level at all.

Seeing the arrival of the Traceless True Monarch, the faces of the True Monarchs changed drastically.

One of the True Monarchs spoke: "Traceless True Monarch, ninety percent of the treasures on Jingchi True Monarch belong to Traceless True Monarch, and the remaining one percent belongs to us, how about it?"

"Die!"

The Traceless True Monarch pointed and directly killed this True Monarch in seconds.

Then, the Traceless True Monarch threatened in a cold voice: "If you don't leave, then stay all here, I am also very interested in the treasures on your body!"

As soon as these words came out, a famous true monarch left quickly, not daring to stay at all.

Actually, the Traceless True Monarch also wanted to kill these True Monarchs, but after thinking about it carefully, it was better to forget it.

These True Monarchs belong to many big forces, and once they are killed, there will be more big forces offended, and besides, these True Monarchs are not rich, so they are not very attractive to him.

The person who really attracted him to do it was Jingchi Zhenjun!

He got the news that Jingchi Zhenjun had obtained a True Ancestor's storage treasure, which most likely contained the entire net worth of a True Ancestor.

The True Ancestors of the Domain Realm were all very wealthy, even if they were True Ancestors in the middle of the Great Dao, their net worth might be richer than the top True Ancestors in this Chaos Region, so he was moved, and he happened to be near this battlefield area, so he rushed over in time.

Looking at the Traceless True Monarch, Jing Chi True Monarch was completely desperate.

He thought that someone would come to his rescue, but he didn't expect that it was the Traceless True Monarch who came, although the Traceless True Monarch and the Void Heaven did not have much grudge, but they were not good friends.

Besides, here in the battlefield ruins, once a big opportunity is encountered, the brothers and sisters of the same force will turn against each other, let alone the true monarchs of other forces?

"You're very lucky, you found the corpse of a True Ancestor in such a short time after entering the battlefield ruins, and you also got the True Ancestor's storage treasures. It's a pity that your strength is not enough, even if you get the opportunity, you will only cheapen others!"

Traceless True Monarch said lightly.

With that, he was ready to do it.

He also knew Jingchi Zhenjun, and knew that the other party was the true monarch of the Void Heaven True Kingdom, but he didn't care.

I saw that he took out his half-way saber, ready to kill Jingchi Zhenjun with one sword.

With his strength, even if he kills Jingchi Zhenjun in his heyday, it is more than enough, not to mention that today's Jingchi Zhenjun is seriously injured and dying, and he definitely has no strength to resist.

"Die!"

Traceless True Monarch slashed it with a single sword.

Rumble!!!!

The brilliant sword left a pitch-black knife mark along the way, this is a spatial knife mark, if it is in the outside world, it is definitely a shattering piece of space, and the battlefield remains that are stable in space can only leave a spatial knife mark.

The knife marks extended all the way, cutting through Jingchi Zhenjun's body and the ground behind him, leaving a bottomless knife channel on the earth.

However, Traceless True Monarch was not excited, but his expression changed.

Because Jing Chi Zhenjun's figure disappeared, what he had just killed was just an afterimage.

Jing Chi Zhenjun was seriously injured and dying, it was absolutely impossible for him to burst out with such a terrifying speed, and it was absolutely difficult to avoid the lock of his knife.

"Who?"

Traceless True Monarch asked in a cold voice.

"Traceless True Monarch, you can't even see my moves, your progress over the years is too slow!"

A voice came, seemingly far away, yet seemingly close at hand.

Wow!

Ye Tian helped Jingchi Zhenjun and suddenly appeared not far away.

But then, Jingchi Zhenjun was included in the inner universe by Ye Tian.

"It turned out to be the Daozi of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The Traceless True Monarch arched his hand, and suddenly changed from the original cold image to an extremely humble appearance!
